items.caption: A bustling cosmetics store on the first floor of a shopping mall. the store is well-lit, with a modern design featuring white and black color accents. the foreground showcases a counter with a glass display case filled with a variety of cosmetics, including lipsticks, eyeshadows, and skincare products. above the counter, a sign reads "givenchy," indicating the brand being sold. in the background, other cosmetics counters can be seen, each with their own brand signage, such as "dior" and "lancome." the floor is tiled, and the ceiling has a grid pattern. the overall atmosphere suggests a busy shopping environment with a focus on beauty and fashion.
